SEARCH
Package dev.deepcore.challenge.events

Class InventoryMechanicsListener

java.lang.Object
dev.deepcore.challenge.events.InventoryMechanicsListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public final class InventoryMechanicsListener extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Routes inventory-related mechanics events to the session coordinator.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    InventoryMechanicsListener(InventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService inventoryMechanicsCoordinatorService)
    Creates an inventory mechanics listener.
